mprRebarSolidAndVisible.Description: Change the state of the visibility of the rebar (view unobscured and view as solid)
mprRebarSolidAndVisible.FullDescription: The "View unobscured" visibility state is applied on any view – both 2D and 3D. "View as solid" is applied only on 3D views
mprRebarSolidAndVisible.Description1: Disable the state of the visibility of the rebar (view unobscured and view as solid)
mprRebarSolidAndVisible.Description2: Settings for element selection options containing reinforcement
mprRebarSolidAndVisible.msg1: Select an element with rebar or reinforcement
mprRebarSolidAndVisible.msg2: Select an elements with rebar or reinforcement
mprRebarSolidAndVisible.h11: All but selected elements on view
